originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&pid_output` is never used.

presenceCondition: (and (= MARLIN_H false) (= PIDTEMP false) (= PID_DEBUG true))
model:
(define-fun PID_DEBUG () Bool
  true)
(define-fun MARLIN_H () Bool
  false)
(define-fun PIDTEMP () Bool
  false)
reasoning: When PIDTEMP=F, the entire #ifdef PIDTEMP block is skipped (including the nested PID_DEBUG block). pid_output=1 at L11 overwritten by pid_output=0 at L19, neither ever read — dead store. PID_DEBUG=T is irrelevant when PIDTEMP=F (the PID_DEBUG block is inside #ifdef PIDTEMP). No '// ERROR' → new bug not in VBDB. Dead store occurs for any PIDTEMP=F config. PC adds MARLIN_H=F AND PID_DEBUG=T unnecessarily. Over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
